accurate.why: All claims match bill text; the characterization that the rule listed the bat as endangered is accurate context supported by CRS summary.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; the Fed. Reg. cite 87 Fed. Reg. 73488 and Nov. 30, 2022 date match bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies this as a CRA disapproval of the FWS northern long-eared bat rule.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes the rule would have no force or effect and explains CRA mechanics.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions or conditions in the resolution.

effective_dates.why: No separate effective date specified in the bill text.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers disapproval, Fed. Reg. cite, operative effect, and legislative status.

concise.why: Appropriate level of detail without padding.

correct_entities.why: U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service and Congressional Review Act correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: 87 Fed. Reg. 73488, November 30, 2022, and May 11, 2023 Senate passage date all match bill text.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
